calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2005 Continued To Aug-29-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Edward Singer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trophy Properties IV DE, LLC.
Plaintiff's witness: George Hawks and Angel Duron, were sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Dean Raymond.
EXH 1 - Residential Tenancy Agreetment--------------ID/EVID.
EXH 2 - Grant Deed----------------------------------ID/EVID.
EXH 3 - Three-day Notice-----------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1330 Bush St., #4D, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $3,249.11
Costs $225.73.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2005 Off Calendar
